<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# Apache HTTPD (HTTP) — servlet-mapping

App at / with Vaadin servlet bound to /ui/*. Hilla endpoints stay at /HILLA/ and /connect/ regardless of the Vaadin mapping, so explicit ProxyPassMatch rules are required.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/ui/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
# Hilla resources are always mapped to the root context regardless
# the vaadin.url-mapping setting
# See https://github.com/vaadin/hilla/issues/289

ProxyPassMatch   "^/ui/(HILLA|connect)/(.*)$"  http://vaadin:8080/$1/$2 upgrade=websocket
ProxyPass        "/ui/"                        http://vaadin:8080/ui/ upgrade=websocket
ProxyPassReverse "/ui/HILLA/"                  http://vaadin:8080/HILLA/
ProxyPassReverse "/ui/connect/"                http://vaadin:8080/connect/
ProxyPassReverse "/ui/"                        http://vaadin:8080/ui/
```

Additional location-scoped rules (`vaadin-location.conf`):

```apache
# Hilla resources are always mapped to the root context regardless
# the vaadin.url-mapping setting
# See https://github.com/vaadin/hilla/issues/289

<Location /ui/>
    ProxyPass               http://vaadin:8080/ui/ upgrade=websocket
    ProxyPassReverse        http://vaadin:8080/ui/
</Location>

<Location /ui/connect/>
    ProxyPass               http://vaadin:8080/connect/
    ProxyPassReverse        http://vaadin:8080/connect/
</Location>

<Location /ui/HILLA/push>
    ProxyPass               ws://vaadin:8080/HILLA/push
</Location>
```
